About Me

I am a data engineering enthusiast focused on building practical, end-to-end systems. My work includes real-time crypto analytics, data cleaning pipelines, analytics dashboards, and backend workflows. I enjoy converting raw data into structured, useful, and visual insights.

Working on real-world data engineering projects, including an FMCG Parent-Child Analytics Platform and a Real-Time Crypto Analytics Platform. Built practical pipelines for ingestion, cleaning, transformation, aggregation, storage, and dashboard reporting.

Featured Projects

Real-Time Crypto Analytics

End-to-end real-time analytics platform built at Lumiq using Binance WebSocket, Kafka, PySpark, PostgreSQL, Grafana, and Docker. It processes live trade data and generates 5-minute price, volume, max, min, and trade-count insights.

Binance → Kafka → PySpark → PostgreSQL → Grafana

FMCG Parent-Child Analytics Pipeline

Built an FMCG data pipeline at Lumiq to manage parent-child product hierarchy, clean product data, transform relationships, and generate product-level analytics for reporting.

Raw FMCG Data → Cleaning → Parent-Child Mapping → Aggregation → Reporting

Inventory Management System

Application for product tracking, inventory updates, sales monitoring, and reporting using Python, Flask, SQL, and REST APIs.
